hero.subtitle: A story of chance encounters, quiet moments, and a bond that reaches beyond the stars.

info.title: What is Adachi to Shimamura?
info.subtitle: For first-time visitors
paragraphs: Adachi to Shimamura is a Japanese light novel series written by Hitoma Iruma and illustrated by Non. It tells the story of two high school girls whose chance meeting blossoms into one of the most beloved slow-burn romances in modern light novels.

Their relationship begins on the second floor of the school gymnasium, where Adachi, a reserved loner, and Shimamura, a carefree truant, spend their afternoons skipping class together. What starts as a casual friendship gradually develops into an intimate journey of self-discovery, affection, and learning how to understand another person.

Celebrated for its introspective prose, subtle character development, and gentle atmosphere, the series has inspired multiple manga adaptations, an anime, and several drama CDs. More than a romance, it is a coming-of-age story about loneliness, connection, and the quiet moments that shape a lifetime.

Welcome to Adashima Latinoamérica!
We're continuously adding new translations, guides, media, and community resources.

footer:
An unofficial, non-profit fan site dedicated to Adachi to Shimamura.
Created by fans, for fans.
All rights to Adachi to Shimamura belong to Hitoma Iruma, Non, ASCII Media Works, Kadokawa, and their respective copyright holders.

feedback.title: Send Feedback
feedback.subtitle: Found a typo, broken link, missing content, translation issue, or have an idea to improve the site? We'd love to hear from you.
feedback.descPlaceholder: Provide as much detail as possible to help us understand your report or suggestion.
feedback.emailHint: Optional. We'll only use it if we need to follow up regarding your submission.
feedback.successText: Your feedback has been sent successfully. We appreciate your help in making the site better.
